description: Hand-labelled memorial OCR ground-truth records for extraction accuracy evaluation (issue #121).
placeholder_note: No records committed yet. Awaiting hand-labelled dataset from local community group. See eval/README.md for the expected record schema and docs/evaluation.md for instructions.
notes: expected_needs_review indicates whether a human reviewer would flag the record for manual inspection (e.g., damaged stone, faded text, ambiguous lettering). Add at least 20 records before enabling the CI accuracy gate.
